spec_match.rationale: Five hidden Web Animations with chained delays each export overallProgress; the master bar is the mean — a direct demo of the spec property in a multi-phase loading scenario.

interactive.rationale: Start/Reset controls drive five concurrent animations; the master bar, per-phase bars, percentage labels, and live overallProgress readout cells all update on every frame.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb describes exactly what's rendered — five chained CSS-style animations whose overallProgress feeds bars without timer math.

edge_cases.rationale: Has a Date.now-based fallback for unsupported browsers (good), but doesn't show what overallProgress returns during the pre-delay window of a not-yet-started phase (the spec says progress against effect end including delay) — the phase bars stay at 0 which is visually correct but the readout cells obscure the timing model.

references.rationale: see-also section links to sibling demos only — missing both the chromestatus.com/feature/5083257285378048 link (required by CLAUDE.md invariant 3) and the drafts.csswg.org spec anchor.

design_system.rationale: Uses raw hex values for the explain-cell heads — #ffeef0 / #991b1b for 'bad', #e6f4ea / #065f46 for 'good' — and a unicode check mark (✓). Both violate CLAUDE.md invariant 5 (CSS variables, never raw hex) and the no-emoji rule from user memory.

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex with CSS variables
openQuestions.detail: The .explain-head.bad / .good rules use #ffeef0 / #991b1b / #e6f4ea / #065f46. Per CLAUDE.md invariant 5, every text-on-background pair must come from the variables in public/styles.css and must hit WCAG AA. Swap to --accent-rose / --accent-emerald on --bg-stone (verify contrast).

openQuestions.title: Add chromestatus + spec links
openQuestions.detail: see-also currently only cross-links sibling concepts. CLAUDE.md invariant 3 requires the chromestatus.com/feature/5083257285378048 link on every concept; the page also needs the drafts.csswg.org spec anchor for completeness.

openQuestions.title: Remove the unicode check marks
openQuestions.detail: Strings like 'Animation.overallProgress supported ✓' and 'complete ✓' use a unicode check character. User feedback rule: use inline SVG, not emoji or unicode glyphs. Replace with the existing design-system status pattern (text + colour class).

openQuestions.title: Surface the pre-delay phase state
openQuestions.detail: While phases 2–5 are still inside their delay, overallProgress on those animations should already be defined and 0 — the readout cells could highlight 'waiting (delay 4.0s)' to teach that the property doesn't lie about not-yet-running phases.

summary: Conceptually the richest concept in this feature — a real five-phase orchestration with a clean before/after framing. But it has the most design-system regressions in the feature: raw hex colours, unicode check marks, missing chromestatus + spec links. All four can be fixed in one pass.
